deprecated_comments.description: zwp_linux_dmabuf_v1 version 3+ uses modifier event instead)

note_comments.description: This does not free the underlying shared memory in the pool.
baseEvent would need to be queried from connection,
conn.File() creates a duplicate fd, which we use for low-level syscalls.
Our socket implementation doesn't buffer, so this is a no-op.
The interface name is sent as a string in the bind request.
CPU→GPU buffer copy not yet exposed in Go API
